limitations: ai_investment_intensity: No named AI systems, vendors, partners, dedicated budgets, or quantified spend disclosed; language is entirely aspirational/competitive-framing with no evidence of active investment programs.
ai_narrative_concreteness: No named AI initiatives or deployed use cases described; all AI references are risk-oriented or competitive-context framing rather than operational deployment detail.

ai_risk_disclosure_depth: Excerpts are from the [business] section which contains risk-factor-style language; specific mechanisms disclosed (IP infringement, cybersecurity amplification, operational disruptions, flawed decision-making) justify score 4, though no quantification or named governance bodies are present.
